feed.title: Gaurav's GitHub Page
feed.subtitle: Just a place for all my code.

entry.title: Search Pattern (Rabin-Karp Algorithm) (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)
entry.summary: PROBLEM DESCRIPTION Given two strings, one is a text string and the other is a pattern string. The task is to print the starting indexes of all the occurrences of the pattern string in the text string. For printing, the Starting Index of a string should be taken as 1. The strings will only contain lowercase English alphabets (‘a’ to ‘z’). geeksforgeeks SOLUTION INITIAL APPROACH (ACCEPTED) ...

entry.title: Count total set bits (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)

link.title: Count total set bits (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)

entry.summary: PROBLEM DESCRIPTION You are given a number n. Find the total count of set bits for all numbers from 1 to n (both inclusive). geeksforgeeks SOLUTION BRUTE-FORCE (TLE) class Solution{ //Function to return sum of count of set bits in the integers from 1 to n. public static int countSetBits(int n){ int c = 0; for(int i=1; i<=n; i++){ c+=count(i); ...

entry.title: Rotate Bits (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)
entry.summary: PROBLEM DESCRIPTION Given an integer N and an integer D, rotate the binary representation of the integer N by D digits to the left as well as right and return the results in their decimal representation after each of the rotation. Note: Integer N is stored using 16 bits. i.e. 12 will be stored as 0000000000001100. geeksforgeeks SOLUTION Good Explanation - geeksforgeeks Left Shift: If we l...

entry.title: Rotate matrix elements clockwise (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)

link.title: Rotate matrix elements clockwise (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)

entry.summary: PROBLEM DESCRIPTION Given two integers M, N, and a 2D matrix Mat of dimensions MxN, clockwise rotate the elements in it. geeksforgeeks SOLUTION We handle the matrix layer by layer, starting by defining the top, bottom, left, and right boundaries, which will keep updating as we move inward to the inner layers. The main idea is to store the element just below the top-left corner for rota...

entry.title: Alien Dictionary (geeksforgeeks - SDE Sheet)
entry.summary: PROBLEM DESCRIPTION Given a sorted dictionary of an alien language having N words and k starting alphabets of standard dictionary. Find the order of characters in the alien language. Note: Many orders may be possible for a particular test case, thus you may return any valid order and output will be 1 if the order of string returned by the function is correct else 0 denoting incorrect string re...
